sections.paragraph:
Original: ספן

Transliteration: sâphan

Phonetic: saw-fan'

BDB Definition:

  1. to cover, cover in, wainscotted, covered with boards or panelling
    1. (Qal)
      1. to cover in, panel
      2. covered, panelled (participle)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1537

Part(s) of speech: Verb
